# MoveCostMatrix

> Free, privacy-first moving cost calculator. Compare DIY truck rental, moving containers, and professional movers side by side. No email required, no data collection.

## Key Pages

- [Home — Moving Cost Calculator](https://movecostmatrix.com/)
- [About Us](https://movecostmatrix.com/about)
- [Contact](https://movecostmatrix.com/contact)
- [Privacy Policy](https://movecostmatrix.com/privacy)
- [Terms and Conditions](https://movecostmatrix.com/terms)
- [Press](https://movecostmatrix.com/press)
- [Machine-Readable Pricing](https://movecostmatrix.com/pricing.md)
- [Sitemap](https://movecostmatrix.com/sitemap.xml)

## Features

- Three-way estimate comparison: DIY truck ($0.80/mi), Moving containers ($1.50/mi), Professional movers ($2.50/mi)
- Real distance calculation via postal code geocoding (Haversine + 20% road adjustment)
- 7 currencies: USD, EUR, GBP, CAD, AUD, INR, JPY
- Unit toggle: miles and kilometers
- Region-specific mover recommendations (8 regions)
- Dark mode with system preference detection
- 100% client-side: no data collection, no account needed
